name: ScanManifestContract
tldr: JSON output of `relic scan --json`: tech stack, key files, file tree, and existing artifacts.

name: ContextResultContract
tldr: JSON output of `relic context`: active spec, resolution source, file existence, shared artifact refs, and active fix ID.

name: ArtifactsJsonContract
tldr: Per-spec artifacts.json declaring owns[], reads[], and touches_files[] relationships.

name: ManifestJsonContract
tldr: shared/<subdir>/manifest.json index of artifact files with name, file, tldr, and tags.

name: ScaffoldResultContract
tldr: JSON output of `relic scaffold`: spec_id, spec_dir, was_new, and files_created.

name: FixDocumentContract
tldr: Schema for .relic/fixes/<fix-id>.md: classification, proposed changes, status, and changelog draft.
